content.problemStatement:
Chef is in a shop with NNN distinct items. The iii-th item is sold at a price of CiC_iCi​.

Chef only wants expensive items, and so he has decided that he will buy the KKK most expensive items. Find how much total cost Chef had to pay to buy the KKK most expensive items.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains 222 integers - NNN and KKK.
The second line contains NNN integers - C1,C2,…,CNC_1, C_2, \ldots, C_NC1​,C2​,…,CN​.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the total cost to buy KKK most expensive items.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1 : Chef buys all items for 1+100+5=1061 + 100 + 5 = 1061+100+5=106.
Test Case 2 : Chef buys only the most expensive item, which is 100100100.
